creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Max Kostikov from comment #5)
Error: Missing: etc/rc.d/h2o
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/README.md
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/acl.rb
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/bootstrap.rb
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/dos_detector.rb
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/htpasswd.rb
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/lru_cache.rb
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/preloads.rb
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/mruby/trie_addr.rb

The %%MRUBY%% is for when the option is selected, when unselected build errors occur due to it being removed. Also the rc.d script is automatically added to plist and is not needed.

Last thing is the added README.md is not being found or installed.
